title: Peel rod
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''peel rod''' was a device used to adjust the sound of the [[Dorenian Beshniquel/Legends|Dorenian Beshniquel]], and was thus used often by [[Jizz/Legends|jizz]] bands.
